{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.4": 3, "R1.7": 2, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies the key issue with the original text (framing GPT-3 as current frontier) and contrasts it with the revised version. It doesn't explicitly name prior work but highlights the shift in framing.",
    "R1.7": "The agent points out a missing citation for a newer meta-analysis on BLEU/ROUGE correlation, but doesn't engage deeply with other citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent acknowledges uncertainty by stating assumptions about the paper's setting and suggesting potential alternative interpretations of the results.",
    "RX.3": "The agent accurately identifies the scope of the original text and its revisions, focusing on addressing the anachronism, overclaims, and methodological issues.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's feedback does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides specific examples of changes made to the text and explains the reasons behind them, demonstrating traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.8, "R1.7": 0.6, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies the key issue with the original text (framing GPT-3 as current frontier) and contrasts it with the revised version. It doesn't explicitly name prior work but highlights the shift in framing.
rationale.R1.7: The agent points out a missing citation for a newer meta-analysis on BLEU/ROUGE correlation, but doesn't engage deeply with other citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty by stating assumptions about the paper's setting and suggesting potential alternative interpretations of the results.
rationale.RX.3: The agent accurately identifies the scope of the original text and its revisions, focusing on addressing the anachronism, overclaims, and methodological issues.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's feedback does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides specific examples of changes made to the text and explains the reasons behind them, demonstrating traceability.
